chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Rev. Application No.S-51 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on MA 3204 /24 3.For hearing of main case 24-10-2024 Mr. Shamausdin N. Kobhar, Advocate for applicant. **** When confronted with the maintainability of this Revision, counsel for applicant is unable to satisfy the Court. Since the judgment passed by appellate Court wherein accused was acquitted, Acquittal Appeal was to be filed, however, Revision has been preferred. Even today if Revision is converted into Acquittal Appeal, same would be time barred. Therefore, this Crl. Revision along with listed application being not maintainable is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Ahmad
